name: Maumau Guardrails
description: NeMo Guardrails bridge for Maumau prompt, tool, and output policy checks.

baseUrl.label: Guardrails URL
baseUrl.help: Base URL for the local Maumau guardrails or NeMo Guardrails sidecar.

authToken.label: Auth Token
authToken.help: Optional bearer token sent to the guardrails sidecar.

failClosed.label: Fail Closed
failClosed.help: Block sends and tool calls when the sidecar is unavailable.

promptGuards.label: Prompt Guards
promptGuards.help: Run prompt policy checks before the model prompt is finalized.

toolGuards.label: Tool Guards
toolGuards.help: Run policy checks before tool execution.

outputGuards.label: Output Guards
outputGuards.help: Run policy checks before outbound messages are sent.
